page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1:8 ratio of processing cores to memory, the instance delivers 512.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core.

The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer for distributed workloads. Because it features dedicated CPU allocation with one thread per core, the instance avoids resource contention issues common in multi-threaded or shared environments.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r7.16xlarge offers a high-density memory profile suitable for enterprise workloads that require substantial RAM without the overhead of GPU hardware. This makes it a viable option for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy caching layers, and complex data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, running at 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor with dedicated CPU allocation and one thread per core, ensuring consistent performance without hyperthreading overhead. It does not include local storage or GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive enterprise applications, making it highly suitable for in-memory databases, large-scale caching, and data analytics workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated physical cores and high network bandwidth for demanding enterprise database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
512.0 GB of RAM providing a 1:8 core-to-memory ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Dedicated CPU allocation with one thread per core and no hyperthreading
Optimized for in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and caching layers
